MarathonPage.chooseMarathonDomain: Choose a marathon domain to continue
MarathonPage.noMarathonsDescription: You don't have access to any marathons yet. Contact an administrator to get access.

LivePage.submissionsUnavailable: No topic is open for submissions right now.
LivePage.submissionsNotOpenYet: Submissions have not opened for the current topic yet.
LivePage.submissionsClosed: Submissions are closed for the current topic.

participantNumber.title: Enter your participant number
participantNumber.description: Enter your 4-digit participant number to continue
participantNumber.descriptionAlreadyExists: We found your participant number. Click continue to proceed.
participantNumber.descriptionPrepared: We found a prepared participant with this number. Continue to start the actual upload flow.
participantNumber.required: A number with 1 to 4 digits is required.
participantNumber.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
participantNumber.blocked: This participant number has already been fully submitted and cannot be used again.
participantNumber.prepareBlocked: This participant number has already started the upload flow and cannot be prepared again.

confirmDialog.title: Confirm Participant
confirmDialog.description: We found a session for participant number {ref}. Is this you?
confirmDialog.descriptionExists: We found a session for participant number {ref}. Is this you?
confirmDialog.descriptionNew: This will create a new upload session for this participant number. Continue?
confirmDialog.descriptionPrepared: Participant number {ref} is already prepared. Continue to start the actual upload flow now?

participantDetails.title: Your Details
participantDetails.description: Please confirm your details to continue
participantDetails.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
participantDetails.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
participantDetails.activeTopicAlreadyUploaded: You have already uploaded a photo for the current topic.
participantDetails.resolveError: We could not check your existing by-camera participant. Please try again.
participantDetails.replaceExistingDescription: A submission has already been uploaded for the current topic with this phone number. If you continue, the existing upload for the active topic will be replaced.

classSelection.title: Select Your Class
classSelection.description: Choose the class you want to participate in

deviceSelection.title: Select Your Device
deviceSelection.description: Choose the device you used to take your photos

participantConfirmation.title: Confirm Participant
participantConfirmation.description: To verify your submission, please enter your participant number again.

uploadStep.title: Upload Your Photos
uploadStep.description: Select and upload your photos for submission
uploadStep.readyToSubmit: You have selected all {count} photos. Ready to submit.
uploadStep.clickToSelect: Click or tap to select photos
uploadStep.confirmGoBack: Are you sure you want to go back? This will clear all selected photos.
uploadStep.tooManyFiles: Too many files selected. Only {max} more can be added.
uploadStep.selectAllPhotos: Please select all {count} photos before submitting
uploadStep.selectPhoto: Please select a photo before continuing
uploadStep.selectPhotoPrompt: Tap here to select a photo
uploadStep.failedToGetPresignedUrls: Failed to get upload URLs. Please try again.
uploadStep.confirmUploadDescription: You are about to upload {count} photos for participant {ref}. This action cannot be undone.
uploadStep.confirmUploadDescriptionGeneric: You are about to upload {count} photos. This action cannot be undone.
uploadStep.noExifData: No EXIF metadata found. This submission will be flagged.

uploadProgress.clickToRetry: Some files failed. Click retry to try again.
uploadProgress.finishingSubmission: Your photos are uploaded. We are finishing your submission.
uploadProgress.checkConnection: Please check your connection and try again

uploadFinalizing.title: Finalizing your submission
uploadFinalizing.description: Your photos has been successfully recieved!
uploadFinalizing.timeoutDescription: We could not finish the registration yet, but your photos are safely stored.
uploadFinalizing.receivedDescription: You do not need to upload your photos again.
uploadFinalizing.waitNote: Please keep this page open for a moment while we finish things in the background.
uploadFinalizing.staffHelp: Show this participant number to staff so they can help complete the registration.
uploadFinalizing.autoContinue: If the registration finishes automatically, this page will continue on its own.

prepareStep.reviewDescription: Double-check everything below before saving. A staff member will match your photos to this entry later.
prepareStep.readyDescription: Your details have been saved. Remember your participant number — staff will ask for it when it's time to upload photos.
prepareStep.nextBody: Remember your participant number. Staff will use it to link your photos later.
prepareStep.saveFailed: Failed to save — please try again

prepareCompleted.title: Participant saved
prepareCompleted.description: This registration is ready for the later upload station. Keep the participant number nearby so staff can attach the photos to the correct entry.
prepareCompleted.participantNumberHelp: This number is what staff will ask for when the participant returns to upload photos.
prepareCompleted.nextStepsDescription: Nothing else needs to be done here right now.
prepareCompleted.stepOneBody: Save or note the participant number so it is easy to find again later.
prepareCompleted.stepTwoBody: When it is time to upload, staff will use the number to open the saved registration.
prepareCompleted.stepThreeBody: The participant can close this page now and return when the upload station is ready.

VerificationPage.showQrCode: Show this QR code to a crew member to verify your submission.

ConfirmationPage.photosUploaded: Your {count} photos are uploaded and ready for judging! Good work!
ConfirmationPage.votingMessage: You will get an email/SMS when the voting process starts. All participants will vote to determine the winner!

steps.1: We verify all photo series while you sleep well. (Save your photos for a week in case something goes wrong)
steps.2: The photos go to print already at the beginning of next week
steps.3: The jury meets {juryDate}. First {resultsDate} you can share your competition photos outside our group on Facebook
steps.4: Book in {prizeDate} already as the annual prize ceremony is planned!

rateImages.title: Shortlist with stars
rateImages.description: Tap the stars below each photo to leave private review notes from 1 to 5. These stars are only for your own sorting and are not part of the final vote. You can't mark your own photo.

navigatePhotos.title: Browse photos
navigatePhotos.description: Swipe or use the arrow buttons to move between photos. Tap the grid button to see all thumbnails and jump to any photo.

filterByRating.title: Filter your shortlist
filterByRating.description: Use the filters at the top to revisit photos you've marked with a certain number of stars, compare favorites, or find photos you haven't reviewed yet.

chooseFinalPhoto.title: Pick one photo to vote for
chooseFinalPhoto.description: When you're viewing the photo you want to choose, tap "{buttonLabel}". This is the only action that counts as your vote. You can't vote for your own photo.

confirmVote.title: Confirm your vote
confirmVote.description: After you tap "{buttonLabel}", confirm to submit your final vote. Your vote can't be changed later.

footer.navigationHint: Swipe or use the arrows to browse photos
footer.reviewHint: Stars are private review notes. Only the button below submits your final vote.

voteButton.cannotVoteForYourself: You can't vote for your own photo
voteButton.dialogDescription: You're about to submit your final vote for the photo you're viewing now.

emptyState.title: No photos found
emptyState.filteredDescription: You haven't marked any photos {rating} stars yet.
emptyState.defaultDescription: There are no photos to review right now.

toasts.cannotVoteForOwn: You can't vote for your own photo.
toasts.alreadyVoted: You have already submitted your vote.
toasts.submitFailed: Failed to submit your vote. Please try again.
